# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    system {
        name "apply-groups"
    }
    groups {
        group "common-bgp" {
            router "Base" {
                bgp {
                    group "ebgp" {
                        peer-as 65010
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
        apply-groups "common-bgp"
        bgp {
            group "ebgp" {
                import {
                    policy ["import-all"]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
